modality.notes: Passive shall-construction expressing legal obligation.

actor.notes: Inferred from passive voice. The entity that processes personal data.

action.value: process personal data
action.notes: Core action described in passive voice.

constraint.value: Personal data must be processed lawfully, fairly, and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject.
constraint.notes: Embedded quality constraint on processing.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall-construction with embedded negative constraint.

actor.value: entity collecting or further processing personal data
actor.notes: Inferred from passive voice and collecting/processing context.

action.value: collect and further process personal data
action.notes: Two-part action: collection and further processing.

constraint.value: Personal data must be collected for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes, and must not be further processed in a manner incompatible with those purposes.
constraint.notes: Purpose limitation with negative constraint on incompatible further processing.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall-construction expressing data minimisation obligation.

actor.notes: Inferred from passive voice.

action.value: process personal data
action.notes: Core processing action.

condition.value: Processing is carried out in relation to specified purposes.
condition.notes: The adequacy/relevance/limitation judgment is conditional on the processing purpose.

constraint.value: Personal data must be adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary for the purposes for which they are processed.
constraint.notes: Data minimisation constraint.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Conditional shall-obligation triggered by consent-based processing.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated controller as active subject.

action.value: demonstrate consent to processing
action.notes: The controller must demonstrate that the data subject consented.

constraint.value: The controller must be able to demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data.
constraint.notes: Accountability constraint — burden of proof on controller.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall be prohibited — express prohibition of special category processing.

actor.notes: Inferred from passive voice. Any entity performing the prohibited processing.

action.value: process special categories of personal data
action.notes: Processing of enumerated special data categories.

condition.value: The personal data reveal racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, trade union membership, genetic data, biometric data for unique identification, health data, sex life data, or sexual orientation data.
condition.notes: Enumerated triggering conditions for the prohibition.

constraint.value: Processing of special categories of personal data is prohibited.
constraint.notes: Core prohibition constraint.

exception.notes: not applicable — Article 9(2) exceptions are not in this sentence

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Classification rule defining unlimited income tax liability — not an action obligation.

actor.notes: The persons classified by this rule.

action.value: be subject to unlimited income tax liability
action.notes: The status imposed by this classification rule.

condition.value: The person has a residence or habitual abode in Austria.

constraint.value: The person is classified as subject to unlimited income tax liability.
constraint.notes: The normative consequence of satisfying the condition.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Classification rule defining scope of unlimited tax liability.

actor.notes: Persons classified under this rule.

action.value: be subject to unlimited income tax liability
action.notes: The status and its scope are defined.

condition.value: The person has a residence or habitual abode in Austria.

constraint.value: Unlimited tax liability extends to all domestic and foreign income.
constraint.notes: Worldwide income scope of unlimited liability.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Classification rule defining limited tax liability and its scope.

actor.notes: Persons classified under limited liability.

action.value: be subject to limited income tax liability
action.notes: Limited liability status.

condition.value: The person has neither a residence nor a habitual abode in Austria.

constraint.value: Limited tax liability extends only to the income listed in § 98.
constraint.notes: Source-limited scope of tax liability.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: May-construction granting the data subject a right of withdrawal.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated active subject.

action.value: withdraw consent
action.notes: The permitted action.

condition.notes: not applicable — the right is unconditional (may withdraw at any time)

constraint.value: Withdrawal shall not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
constraint.notes: Safeguard constraint preserving prior lawful processing.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall be lawful — obligation satisfied when conditions are met.

actor.notes: Legitimate interest holder pursuing the processing purpose.

action.value: process personal data for legitimate interests
action.notes: The processing action made lawful by the balancing test.

condition.value: Processing is necessary for legitimate interests pursued by controller or third party, and such interests are not overridden by data subject interests or fundamental rights.

constraint.value: The processing shall be lawful when legitimate interests prevail over data subject rights.
constraint.notes: The normative consequence of passing the balancing test.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall not apply — prohibition lifted under specific exception.

actor.value: entity processing special categories of personal data
actor.notes: Inferred actor subject to the prohibition exception.

action.value: process special categories of personal data
action.notes: The processing that becomes lawful under the exception.

condition.value: The data subject has given explicit consent to the processing for one or more specified purposes.
condition.notes: Explicit consent condition that lifts the prohibition.

constraint.value: Processing of special category data is prohibited unless the data subject gives explicit consent.
constraint.notes: The prohibition-with-exception normative structure.

exception.value: Union or Member State law provides that the prohibition may not be lifted by the data subject.
exception.notes: Exception-to-exception: the consent exception does not apply where law prohibits lifting.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall provide — mandatory information disclosure obligation.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated obligation bearer.

action.value: provide identity, contact details, and processing information to data subject
action.notes: Multi-item disclosure action.

condition.value: Personal data are obtained from the data subject.
condition.notes: Timing/trigger condition for the disclosure duty.

constraint.value: The controller must provide the data subject with identity, contact, purpose, and legal basis information.
constraint.notes: Enumerated mandatory disclosure items.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall be implemented — mandatory implementation of data protection measures.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated obligation bearer in passive construction.

action.value: implement appropriate technical and organisational measures
action.notes: Implementation action with dual measure categories.

condition.value: Implementation must occur both at the time of determining processing means and at the time of processing itself.
condition.notes: Dual timing condition: design-time and run-time.

constraint.value: Measures must effectively implement data protection principles.
constraint.notes: Effectiveness constraint on the measures.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall maintain — mandatory record-keeping obligation.

actor.notes: Dual obligation bearers: controller and processor.

action.value: maintain a record of processing activities
action.notes: Record-keeping action.

constraint.value: The record must contain controller contact details, processing purposes, data subject categories, personal data categories, and applicable third country transfers.
constraint.notes: Enumerated mandatory record content.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Means — legal definition of personal data.

actor.notes: The data subject defined by this term.

action.value: be identified directly or indirectly
action.notes: The identification criterion that makes information personal data.

constraint.value: Personal data covers any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person identifiable by reference to name, identification number, location data, or online identifier.
constraint.notes: Broad scope of the definition with non-exhaustive identifier examples.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall submit — mandatory tax return filing obligation.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated obligation bearer.

action.value: submit annual income tax return
action.notes: Tax return submission action.

condition.value: Total annual income exceeds the statutory threshold.

constraint.value: The return must be submitted to the competent tax office by the end of April of the following calendar year.
constraint.notes: Jurisdiction and deadline constraints.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: May opt — permissive joint assessment election.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated permission holders.

action.value: opt for joint income tax assessment
action.notes: Elective assessment action.

condition.value: Both spouses have unlimited tax liability and do not live permanently separated.

constraint.value: Joint assessment is available only to married couples meeting the residency and non-separation conditions.
constraint.notes: Eligibility constraint.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall not be deducted — express deduction prohibition.

actor.notes: The person prohibited from deducting.

action.value: deduct personal living expenses
action.notes: The prohibited deduction action.

constraint.value: Personal living expenses of the taxpayer or family members shall not be deducted from taxable income under any circumstances.
constraint.notes: Absolute prohibition — no circumstances allow deduction.

exception.notes: not applicable — under any circumstances means no exception

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Tax exemption classification with conditions and exceptions.

actor.notes: Person potentially eligible for exemption.

action.value: be exempt from income tax on employment income
action.notes: The exemption status.

condition.value: Annual employment income does not exceed fifteen thousand euros and the taxpayer has no other sources of income.
condition.notes: Two-part condition: income ceiling and exclusivity of income source.

constraint.value: Exemption applies up to an annual amount of fifteen thousand euros of employment income.
constraint.notes: Quantitative exemption ceiling.

exception.value: The taxpayer voluntarily opts for standard assessment.
exception.notes: Opt-out exception: taxpayer can choose standard assessment instead.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall be computed — mandatory income computation rule.

actor.notes: Inferred: the entity performing income computation.

action.value: compute taxable income
action.notes: Computation action.

constraint.value: Taxable income is the total of all seven income categories minus special expenses, extraordinary burdens, and tax allowances, rounded down to whole euros.
constraint.notes: Formula constraint with deduction enumeration and rounding rule.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall be issued — mandatory issuance of assessment notice.

actor.notes: Explicitly stated issuing entity.

action.value: issue income tax assessment notice
action.notes: Assessment notice issuance action.

constraint.value: The notice shall be in writing and contain taxable income amount, applicable tax rate, computed tax liability, and tax credits applied.
constraint.notes: Form and content constraints on the assessment notice.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Shall be — mandatory progressive tax rate application.

actor.notes: Inferred: entity applying the tax rate.

action.value: apply fifty-five percent tax rate
action.notes: Tax rate application on excess income.

condition.value: Total annual income exceeds one million euros.

constraint.value: The fifty-five percent rate applies to the portion of income exceeding one million euros.
constraint.notes: Marginal rate constraint — only excess is taxed at the higher rate.

exception.value: The taxpayer has claimed extraordinary tax relief measures in the same assessment period.
exception.notes: Relief exception: the higher rate does not apply if relief measures were claimed.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Legal definition of business expenses.

actor.notes: Inferred: the person incurring business expenses.

action.value: incur business expenditures
action.notes: The spending action that qualifies as business expense.

condition.value: The expenditure is incurred through the operation of a business and is objectively connected to the business activity.
condition.notes: Causal connection and objective link conditions.

constraint.value: Business expenses include materials, personnel, depreciation, and business loan interest.
constraint.notes: Non-exhaustive enumeration of qualifying expense categories.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only

modality.notes: Legal definition of income.

actor.notes: The income earner.

action.value: receive revenues
action.notes: Revenue accrual action.

constraint.value: Income includes all revenues in money or money's worth from employment, self-employment, business, capital, rental, agriculture and forestry, and other recurring benefits within a calendar year.
constraint.notes: Seven-category enumeration with temporal scope constraint.

claim_boundary: controlled mini-gold for project experiment only
